---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
What problem does this feature solve?

**Proposed Solution**
Describe the feature and how it would work.

**Alternatives Considered**
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

**Additional context**
Links to papers, related projects, or other relevant information.

> Before implementing, please review [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for project conventions.
